macro.intro: The macroeconomic environment is characterized by rising inflation with CPI YoY at 330.29% and geopolitical tensions impacting markets. The Fed Funds Rate remains steady at 3.64%, while the 10Y-2Y Yield Spread has narrowed to 0.5%. No major economic events are scheduled for today, but ongoing Middle East conflicts and US-Iran talks are influencing market sentiment.

snapshot.name: WTI Crude Oil
snapshot.note: Price slides below $100 as China defies US blockade

snapshot.name: S&P 500
snapshot.note: Rally on optimism over US-Iran talks

setups.name: Gold Long Setup
setups.rationale: Gold is gaining as a safe-haven asset amid Middle East tensions. With CPI YoY inflation at 330.29%, inflationary pressures support higher gold prices. Entry at $1980.00 with a target of $2025.00, considering geopolitical risks.

metrics.label: CPI Inflation
metrics.text: High inflation supports gold as a hedge

metrics.label: Geopolitical Tensions
metrics.text: Middle East conflict increases safe-haven demand

metrics.label: Economic event
metrics.text: No major events, focus on geopolitical news

metrics.label: 10Y TIPS Yield
metrics.text: Real yields slightly down, supporting gold

concerns.label: Primary risk
concerns.text: De-escalation in US-Iran talks could reduce safe-haven demand

concerns.label: Secondary risk
concerns.text: Stronger USD could pressure gold prices

setups.hedge: Consider shorting USD/JPY if gold position underperforms.

setups.name: S&P 500 Short Setup
setups.rationale: Despite the rally, the S&P 500 faces overbought conditions. The Fear & Greed Index is not available, but sentiment appears overly optimistic. Entry at 4350.00 with a target of 4250.00.

concerns.label: Primary risk
concerns.text: Continued optimism on US-Iran talks could push index higher

concerns.label: Secondary risk
concerns.text: Strong earnings reports could support further gains

setups.hedge: Consider long VIX if S&P 500 short underperforms.

setups.name: EUR/USD Long Setup
setups.rationale: EUR/USD is approaching key resistance at 1.1000. With the Fed Funds Rate steady at 3.64% and no major economic events, focus is on technical levels. Entry at 1.0950 with a target of 1.1050.

concerns.label: Primary risk
concerns.text: USD strength could cap EUR/USD gains

concerns.label: Secondary risk
concerns.text: Geopolitical tensions could increase USD demand

setups.hedge: Consider short USD/CHF if EUR/USD long underperforms.

contrarian.body: Despite the current slide below $100, geopolitical tensions and potential supply disruptions could drive prices higher. With the IMF slashing growth forecasts, oil demand may be pressured, but supply risks remain.
contrarian.warning: A rapid de-escalation in the Middle East could lead to a sharp drop in oil prices. Monitor geopolitical developments closely.

avoid.reason: Flight cancellations amid Middle East conflict increase operational risks.
Record diesel spending due to conflict impacts profitability.
IMF growth downgrade due to Iran war fuels inflation concerns.
IMF slashes growth forecast for Middle East, impacting oil exporters.
IMF warns of adverse scenarios, increasing risk.
Strikes lead to operational shutdowns, impacting revenue.
